---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[ENHANCEMENT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
type: Story

---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the enhancement.

## Problem / Use Case
What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?
Ex. "I find it frustrating when..." or "This would allow users to..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this working. Include any UI/UX ideas if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or examples that support the request.
